title: Plant Life Cycle Science Lesson
subject: science
raw_text:
Plant Life Cycle

Lesson: Students will learn the stages of a plant's life cycle.

1. Read pages 34-36 in the science textbook.
2. Label the diagram showing: seed → germination → seedling → mature plant → flower → fruit/seed.
3. In your science journal, write 3 sentences explaining what a plant needs to grow.
4. Extension: Design an experiment to test what happens if a plant doesn't get sunlight.

Materials: textbook, science journal, coloured pencils, diagram handout.
teacher_goal: EA will lead a small group of 4 students who need the text read aloud and the diagram pre-labelled. EAL students need simplified vocabulary. Extension students should design the experiment independently.
